titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 209: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 209. (A.R. No. 503 of 1930.) VAḶAPPŪRNĀḌU, NAMAKKAL TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the door jamb, right of entrance of the central shrine, Aṟappaḷīśvara temple.

This records an endowment of 100 kaḻañju deposited with the ūrār of Kāṅgayamparuvūr, Ūralam, Punnappuram Mēṟpunnam, Muttūr, Veruṇūr, Vayalūr-maṅgalam and other villages, by Pirāntakan-Mādēvaḍigaḷ alias Sembiyan-Mādēviyār, mother of Kaṇḍaṉ Madhurāntakan alias Uttama-chōḷadēva with the stipulation that in every month each of the above said villages would by turn pay a kaḻañju and quarter as interest on the amount, deposited with them, to the sabhā of Tiruvaṟappaḷḷi for the conduct of worship on the day of saṅkramaṇa every month in the temple of Tiruvaṟappaḷḷi-Āḻvār on the Kollimalai hill in Kolli-nāḍu.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 409.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
kopparakecariparmmaṟk
ku cellā nin
ṟa yāṇṭu 10 6
āvatu kol
lināṭṭuk ko
llimalaime
ṟ tiruvaṟappaḷ
ḷiāḻvārkku kaṇ
ṭan maturāntaka
(n) nārā(n)ṉa śrīut
tamacoḻatevar
taṅkaḷ ḷācci pirā
ntakan māteva
ṭikaḷār cempiyan
māteviyār ko
llimalai nāṭu U
ḷ kāṅka(ya)m paruvū
r Ūralam punnappuram
meṟpunnam mut
tūr veruṇūr vā
yalūr maṅka
lam kayiṟaṅkā
ṭu neṭuvalam
kāmuḷ Ivaṉait
tūr vacamum cem
piyanmāteviyār
śāntrātittavaṟ
niṟkka tiṅkaḷ saṅkra
mattukku vait
ta pon kuṭiñai
kkallāl nūṟṟu
k kaḻañcu po
n koṇṭom I
vaṉait tūromum
Itukku vaitta
pon kaḻañcinvāy
tiṅkaḷ piḷavu po
n palicaiyākki va
nta pon kuṭiñai ka
llāl kaḻañceykā
l tiṅkaḷ Oru Ūrār ti
ruvaṟappaḷḷi sabhaiyā
r vacam kuṭuppatāno
m sabhaiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
